diagnoses.description: Intestinal infection due to Clostridium difficile
Unspecified hereditary and idiopathic peripheral neuropathy
Pneumonitis due to inhalation of food or vomitus
Intestinal or peritoneal adhesions with obstruction (postoperative) (postinfection)
Generalized convulsive epilepsy, without mention of intractable epilepsy
